document: Our new packaging is 100% eco-friendly and helps save the planet for future generations.
GreenCorp is committed to becoming carbon neutral by 2050 through verified offsets and renewable energy investments.
Made with all-natural ingredients, our product is the most sustainable choice on the market.
We reduced our scope-1 emissions by 32% in 2024, audited by Bureau Veritas.
This bottle is green and clean — a guilt-free choice for environmentally conscious shoppers.
Our facility achieved ISO 14001 certification in 2023 and reports annually under the GHG Protocol.
Our planet-friendly formula is gentle on the earth and your skin.
We source 78% of our cotton from Better Cotton Initiative certified farms as of FY2024.
Buying our shoes helps reforest the Amazon — every pair is a step towards a greener tomorrow.
The container is made from 30% post-consumer recycled PET and is curbside-recyclable in 90% of US municipalities.
Our cloud infrastructure is powered by 100% renewable energy, matched annually with RECs.
An ethically-sourced, conscious choice for the modern consumer who cares about Mother Earth.
We commit to zero deforestation in our palm oil supply chain by 2025, verified by RSPO.
Our biodegradable plastic breaks down naturally and leaves no trace in the environment.
FY2024 water withdrawal in water-stressed regions decreased 14% versus our 2019 baseline.
We are dedicated to making the world a better place, one cup of coffee at a time.
expected_phrases: making the world a better place

document: Our supply chain audit covers 100% of tier-1 suppliers and 64% of tier-2 suppliers as of Q2 2024.
These trainers are crafted with sustainable materials from responsibly-managed forests.
Our LCA was conducted by an independent third party and the results are publicly available on our website.
Choose green. Choose sustainable. Choose us.
